title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 509.130 - Adoption of statements by reference — exhibits
text:
509.130.  Adoption of statements by reference — exhibits. — Statements in a pleading may be adopted by reference in a different part of the same pleading or in another pleading or in any motion.  An exhibit to a pleading is a part thereof for all purposes.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 44)
